layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC).
